feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: Something in me just called for me to beyblade off that cliff and I have no regrets… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Something in me just called for me to beyblade off that cliff and I have no regrets… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: It should come to no surprise that I have my own pups and I love her to death… and she really tried to put that to the test… Gnarly smells this day 😵‍💫 #asi#asixversel#zeldat#retrogamingm#gamingerd
entry.content: It should come to no surprise that I have my own pups and I love her to death… and she really tried to put that to the test… Gnarly smells this day 😵‍💫 #asi#asixversel#zeldat#retrogamingm#gamingerd

entry.title: Bombs don’t cause avalanches… A nice head bonk however… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Bombs don’t cause avalanches… A nice head bonk however… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: These ice knights were giving me the work but I managed to them all in their place! Honestly I was getting jumped all throughout this dungeon. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: These ice knights were giving me the work but I managed to them all in their place! Honestly I was getting jumped all throughout this dungeon. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was shaking and moving when it cane to these snow pucks but eventually I had to taste the cold… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was shaking and moving when it cane to these snow pucks but eventually I had to taste the cold… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Like every Zelda has some sort of statue that comes to life and tries to end you. I’m not falling for that…. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Like every Zelda has some sort of statue that comes to life and tries to end you. I’m not falling for that…. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was still figuring this mid boss out and I am not sure where this line of thought was going… well death is where it went 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was still figuring this mid boss out and I am not sure where this line of thought was going… well death is where it went 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Got all that tail out and now they got their ball and chain taken away. Life comes at you fast I guess. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Got all that tail out and now they got their ball and chain taken away. Life comes at you fast I guess. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I don’t know what those sages put in this mirror but I need to get some of that. Wonder if Midna got the plug. 🤔 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I don’t know what those sages put in this mirror but I need to get some of that. Wonder if Midna got the plug. 🤔 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was kinda getting it with this ball and chain. Boss yeti chick barely got a chance to do anything… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was kinda getting it with this ball and chain. Boss yeti chick barely got a chance to do anything… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Hate we had to destroy this poor yeti’s room but at least we got another piece of the twilight mirror. This dungeon was annoying but in a fun way. All I’ll say is fuck ICE in more ways than one. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Hate we had to destroy this poor yeti’s room but at least we got another piece of the twilight mirror. This dungeon was annoying but in a fun way. All I’ll say is fuck ICE in more ways than one. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: This was the cutest thing ever. This dungeon was fairly challenging and quite unique. Might be one of my favorites. Go love on someone this Saturday and make sure you love on yourself. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: This was the cutest thing ever. This dungeon was fairly challenging and quite unique. Might be one of my favorites. Go love on someone this Saturday and make sure you love on yourself. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: While me and my wife were playing Pokemon awhile ago I realized Ryujinx (Switch Emulator) had network capabilities so I decided to play Pokemon with myself four ways. Fun times. #asixverse #blerd #pokemon
entry.content: While me and my wife were playing Pokemon awhile ago I realized Ryujinx (Switch Emulator) had network capabilities so I decided to play Pokemon with myself four ways. Fun times. #asixverse #blerd #pokemon

entry.title: They tried to jump me from above but if it’s one thing Obi Wan has taught me is to take the low ground… wait… 🤔 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: They tried to jump me from above but if it’s one thing Obi Wan has taught me is to take the low ground… wait… 🤔 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Had to take a minute and play some fetch with the Castle Town pups. Such a good pup pups! 🥰 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Had to take a minute and play some fetch with the Castle Town pups. Such a good pup pups! 🥰 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Had to get on my Beyblade ish and turn Link into a bit beast! Sometimes you gotta let it rip! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #beyblade
entry.content: Had to get on my Beyblade ish and turn Link into a bit beast! Sometimes you gotta let it rip! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #beyblade

entry.title: I should’ve expected a Darknut to show up at some point. A fitting mid boss for the Temple of Time! Now it’s time to get like Battle Network and bust this darknut! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: I should’ve expected a Darknut to show up at some point. A fitting mid boss for the Temple of Time! Now it’s time to get like Battle Network and bust this darknut! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: I don’t know if I’ve mentioned it but Twilight Princess has a nice mid boss theme. The whole OST is nice really. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: I don’t know if I’ve mentioned it but Twilight Princess has a nice mid boss theme. The whole OST is nice really. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: I guess the Darknut didn’t appreciate at that last combo but did they really have to throw their blade at me like that… #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: I guess the Darknut didn’t appreciate at that last combo but did they really have to throw their blade at me like that… #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: That was a fun mid boss fight. I hope we get more fights like this going forward. Put my hidden skills to use and what not. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: That was a fun mid boss fight. I hope we get more fights like this going forward. Put my hidden skills to use and what not. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: I had fun with the dominion rod and the puzzles that came with it. Chaperoning this statue was a good time. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: I had fun with the dominion rod and the puzzles that came with it. Chaperoning this statue was a good time. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: Didn’t know Gohma from Ocarina of Time had children. Too bad I gotta end the bloodline. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: Didn’t know Gohma from Ocarina of Time had children. Too bad I gotta end the bloodline. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: Didn’t expect Gohma 2.0 to pull a fake out but then again I guess that’s why it’s a fake out. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: Didn’t expect Gohma 2.0 to pull a fake out but then again I guess that’s why it’s a fake out. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: I had fun with the Temple of Time. Boss was a bit easy but then again the mid boss was a darknut. Great dungeon all around! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: I had fun with the Temple of Time. Boss was a bit easy but then again the mid boss was a darknut. Great dungeon all around! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: This poe is a punk. They knew I was about to take their soul and want to hide under the sunlight… 😒 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: This poe is a punk. They knew I was about to take their soul and want to hide under the sunlight… 😒 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I really enjoyed this part of Twilight Princess! Was diggin’ this western theme and I honestly think it should’ve been a dungeon. #asixverse #retrogaming #zelda #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I really enjoyed this part of Twilight Princess! Was diggin’ this western theme and I honestly think it should’ve been a dungeon. #asixverse #retrogaming #zelda #gaming #blerd

entry.title: That’s crazy to revive all the enemies just because I did my due diligence to howl at rocks to learn new moves… 😭😭😭 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: That’s crazy to revive all the enemies just because I did my due diligence to howl at rocks to learn new moves… 😭😭😭 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I just came back from ye olde western and they want me to go back… Good thing Link trained with Goku cause I didn’t feel like walking back. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #gaming #zelda #retrogaming #blerd
entry.content: I just came back from ye olde western and they want me to go back… Good thing Link trained with Goku cause I didn’t feel like walking back. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #gaming #zelda #retrogaming #blerd

entry.title: The side quest leading up to this had so many 100 rupee chest and now I see why… At least we got out way into the sky! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: The side quest leading up to this had so many 100 rupee chest and now I see why… At least we got out way into the sky! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: And I have officially learned all the hidden skills Old Link had to offer! Now I’m Hyper Link! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming
entry.content: And I have officially learned all the hidden skills Old Link had to offer! Now I’m Hyper Link! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
